project.title: Vibe Coders Academy — Course Business HQ
project.description: Central workspace for Vibe Coders Academy — course business planning, research, automations, and launch ops.

inbox.hint: Denis manual task from launch path

inbox.title: Presentation document (Denis TODO)
inbox.hint: Denis manual task from launch path

inbox.title: Vibe Coders Academy — Business plan
inbox.prompt:
You are the Business Agent for Vibe Coders Academy. Prefix Slack output with: 📊 *Business Agent* |

## On Slack trigger
If message contains "update" or "draft":
- Read business/plan and business/messaging entries in data/hq.db, plus tasks and research.
- Update business collection entries (preserve Denis manual edits; note changes in reply).
- Run python3 scripts/build_site.py
- Reply with: what changed + open questions for Denis.

If message contains "review" or "reality":
- Compare tasks + last 30 days standups to business/plan roadmap section.
- Add variance note as new entry in business collection.

Rules:
- State assumptions for market size numbers.
- No pricing/launch claims unless in messaging entry.
- Follow .cursor/rules/brand-voice.mdc.
inbox.hint: Green-light: Slack → #vibe-business → filter: plan or business

inbox.title: Vibe Coders Academy — Competitor research
inbox.prompt:
You are the Research Agent for Vibe Coders Academy. Prefix Slack output with: 🔍 *Research Agent* |

## On Slack trigger (competitor: NAME or research: NAME)
1. Parse the competitor name from the message.
2. Read research/competitors watchlist table in data/hq.db.
3. Research using web search / Exa MCP. Cite URLs with dates.
4. Insert child entry under research/competitors with report body.
5. Run python3 scripts/build_site.py
6. Reply in thread with: 3-bullet summary + entry slug.

## On weekly schedule
1. Read watchlist priority column from hq.db.
2. For each high-priority competitor not covered in 7 days, append to a weekly report entry.
3. End with Strategic recommendations (max 3 bullets).

Rules:
- Do not invent pricing or features. Mark unknowns explicitly.
- Follow .cursor/rules/competitor-research.mdc.

inbox.title: Vibe Coders Academy — Morning standup prep
inbox.prompt:
You are the PM Agent for Vibe Coders Academy. Prefix Slack output with: 🎯 *PM Agent* |

1. Read data/hq.db — collections: standups (last 7 days), tasks.
2. Read recent git commits if repo is available.
3. Upsert standups entry for YYYY-MM-DD with list_items sections: done, today (max 3), blockers, agent_next.
4. Update tasks collection if priorities changed; do not delete completed items without evidence.
5. Run: python3 scripts/build_site.py
6. If Send to Slack is enabled, post a ≤15 line summary to #vibe-standup.

Rules:
- Never invent completed work.
- Ask Denis explicit questions for blockers.
- Follow .cursor/rules/pm-assistant.mdc conventions.

inbox.title: Vibe Coders Academy — Social drafts
inbox.slackReply: draft: 2 linkedin posts about Cursor automations
inbox.prompt:
You are the Social Agent for Vibe Coders Academy. Prefix Slack output with: 📣 *Social Agent* |

1. Read business/messaging and business/plan entries in data/hq.db.
2. Create 3 draft entries in social collection with props.approved=false.
3. Run python3 scripts/build_site.py
4. Reply in #vibe-social with previews and: "Reply approve 1,2,3 or edit in DB."

Publish automation (separate): only Buffer MCP when props.approved=true.

Rules:
- Follow .cursor/rules/social-guardrails.mdc strictly.
- NEVER publish in this automation.

actions.title: Business — role prompt
actions.prompt:
You are the Business Agent for Vibe Coders Academy. Prefix Slack output with: 📊 *Business Agent* |

Trigger: post `plan update` or `business update` in #vibe-business.

1. Read business/plan, business/messaging, tasks, research in data/hq.db.
2. Update relevant entries; note assumptions.
3. Run python3 scripts/build_site.py
4. Reply: what changed + open questions for Denis.

actions.title: Developer — role prompt
actions.prompt:
You are the Developer Agent for Vibe Coders Academy. Prefix Slack output with: 🛠 *Dev Agent* |

Trigger: @Cursor or post in #vibe-code with a dev task (repo must be attached).

1. Read the request and relevant entries in data/hq.db for context.
2. Implement in the vibe-coding-101 repo — minimal focused diffs.
3. Run python3 scripts/build_site.py if data/UI changed.
4. Reply with: what changed, how to test, any blockers.

Scope: web/, scripts/, data/ — landing page, HQ UI, build pipeline, SQLite helpers.
Rules: match existing conventions; no scope creep; ask before destructive changes.

actions.title: Pm — role prompt
actions.prompt:
You are the PM Agent for Vibe Coders Academy. Prefix Slack output with: 🎯 *PM Agent* |

Read data/hq.db (collections: standups, tasks, actions). After Denis replies in Slack with inputs:
1. Update the matching action(s) in actions collection — set props.status=done, store reply in props.reply.
2. Upsert today's standup with Done / Today (max 3) / Blockers / Agent next actions.
3. Sync tasks collection from roadmap priorities.
4. Run: python3 scripts/build_site.py
5. Post ≤15 line summary to #vibe-standup listing what unblocked and next agent steps.

Rules: never invent completed work; ask explicit questions only when still blocked.

4. Run python3 scripts/build_site.py

competitors.title: Competitor watchlist
competitors.body:
# Competitor watchlist

Add competitors Denis wants tracked. Automations and agents read this list.

| Name | URL | Notes | Priority |
|------|-----|-------|----------|
| SoftUni AI / SoftUni | https://ai.softuni.bg/ | Direct competitor: AI-first programming, vibe coding, AI-assisted development, AI agents/workflows; largest local education brand. | high |
| SoftUni Vibe Coding Fundamentals | https://softuni.bg/modules/155/vibe-coding-fundamentals-january-2026/1615 | Direct offer for beginners and operators building web apps with AI, TypeScript/React/Tailwind/Supabase/Netlify. | high |
| SoftUni AI-Assisted Development | https://ai.softuni.bg/trainings/189/ai-assisted-development-january-2026 | Direct developer offer covering Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, Augment Code, validation workflows, PRs. | high |
| SoftUni AI Agents and Workflows for Developers | https://softuni.bg/trainings/5350/ai-agents-and-worfklows-for-developers-august-2026 | Direct agentic coding/workflows offer covering n8n, LangChain, LangGraph, HITL, observability. | high |
| Telerik Academy — GenAI for Developers | https://www.telerikacademy.com/sprint/genai-for-developers | Adjacent pro-developer GenAI course; strong brand, certificate, business case positioning. | high |
| NobleProg Bulgaria — GitHub Copilot | https://www.nobleprog.bg/en/github-copilot-training | Corporate/onsite AI coding training; Copilot course catalog and scheduled Bulgaria sessions. | high |
| NobleProg Bulgaria — Cursor workflows | https://www.nobleprog.bg/cc/cursor1 | Direct Cursor/agent workflow training for developers and engineering managers. | high |
| IT STEP Computer Academy Bulgaria | https://itstep.bg/python-programming-course | Python + AI / ML and web-development academy; longer career-transition pathway. | medium |
| Advance Academy AI | https://ai.advanceacademy.bg/ai | Bulgarian AI Basics / AI Specialist / business/content AI programs; broader beginner audience. | medium |
| Aula.bg AI / ChatGPT | https://aula.bg/kurs-chatgpt | Bulgarian online AI productivity and ChatGPT courses; not coding-first but competes for AI upskilling budget. | medium |
| New Horizons Bulgaria | https://newhorizons.bg/course-outline/course/ai-3025-work-smarter-with-ai | Corporate Microsoft Copilot / AI productivity training; adjacent B2B budget competitor. | low |

Latest market scan: `research/competitors/2026-05-27-bulgaria-ai-coding-market.md`.

## How to trigger research

- **Slack** (`#vibe-research`): `competitor: {name}` or `research: {name}`
- **Cursor chat:** "Research competitor X and save to research/competitors/"
- **Weekly automation:** scans this table (see `docs/automations/02-competitor-research.md`)

listItems.text: Cursor chat: "Research competitor X and save to research/competitors/"

rows.name: SoftUni AI / SoftUni
rows.notes: Direct competitor: AI-first programming, vibe coding, AI-assisted development, AI agents/workflows; largest local education brand.

rows.notes: Direct offer for beginners and operators building web apps with AI, TypeScript/React/Tailwind/Supabase/Netlify.

rows.notes: Direct agentic coding/workflows offer covering n8n, LangChain, LangGraph, HITL, observability.

rows.notes: Adjacent pro-developer GenAI course; strong brand, certificate, business case positioning.

rows.name: NobleProg Bulgaria — Cursor workflows

messaging.title: Approved messaging
messaging.body:
# Approved messaging

Only claims listed here may appear in social posts, landing copy, or automations.

## Course (fill in with Denis)

- **Working title:** Vibe Coders Academy
- **One-liner:** Стани част от AI революцията
- **Sub-one-liner:** Бъдещето е сега
- **Who it's for:** Developers using Cursor to ship real projects
- **Planned domain:** `vibe-coders.academy` — domain purchased; landing page not live yet

## Pricing & launch

| Item | Approved text | Status |
|------|---------------|--------|
| Price | _Not approved yet_ | draft |
| Launch date | _Not approved yet_ | draft |
| Waitlist URL | _Not approved yet_ | draft |
| Public domain | `vibe-coders.academy` — domain purchased; landing page not live yet | draft |

## Claims we allow

- Teaching Cursor, MCP, and automations for real workflows
- Solo-founder / practitioner perspective

## Claims we do NOT allow (until approved)

- Income guarantees
- Job placement
- "Best" or "#1" without source

planning.officeBrief:
# Office Plovdiv — search brief

**Budget:** under **800 EUR / month** (incl. VAT assumptions TBD per listing)  
**City:** Plovdiv  
**Use:** small team / studio + occasional meetings  

## Sources (automated + manual)

| Source | URL | Notes |
|--------|-----|-------|
| alo.bg search | https://www.alo.bg/searchq/?q=офис%20под%20наем%20пловdiv | Scraped weekly → `data/office-listings.json` |
| alo.bg category | https://www.alo.bg/obiavi/imoti-naemi/magazini-ofisi/?location_ids=3333&region_id=16 | Filter by price in UI |
| imot.bg | https://www.imot.bg/obiavi/prodazhbi-imoti/naemi/plovdiv/ofisi/ | Manual shortlist; sample 400 EUR / 50 m² center |

## Agent output

- GitHub Action: `.github/workflows/office-listings.yml` (Mondays 06:00 UTC)
- Run locally: `python3 scripts/fetch_office_listings.py`

## Denis next steps

1. Review `data/office-listings.json` after each run.
2. Shortlist 3–5 for visits (Kapana, center, Dondukov garden area).
3. Confirm deposit / VAT / fit-out before signing.

_Last updated: 2026-05-28 (batched inbox)_

entries.title: Bulgaria AI coding competitor scan
entries.excerpt:
# Bulgaria AI coding competitor scan

**Date:** 2026-05-27  
**Analyst:** Cursor agent  
**Confidence:** medium-high  
**Scope:** Bulgarian businesses and Bulgaria-localized providers for AI coding, vibe coding, agentic coding, Cursor/Copilot training, and adjacent AI upskilling.

## Summary

The Bulgarian market already has direct competition for Vibe Coders Academy. SoftUni is the clearest direct competitor: it has a dedicated SoftUni AI brand, a Vibe Coding / AI-first programming pathway, developer courses for Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, and an AI Agents and Workflows course covering n8n, LangChain, and LangGraph. NobleProg Bulgaria is the strongest corporate-training competitor for Copilot, Cursor, and agent workflows. Telerik Academy competes for professional developer upskilling with a polished GenAI for Developers sprint. IT STEP, Advance Academy, Aula.bg, and New Horizons are adjacent competitors that can absorb beginner, productivity, and corporate AI training demand.

## Offer & positioning

| Competitor | Directness | Offer & positioning | Audience | Priority |
|------------|------------|----------------------|----------|----------|
| SoftUni AI / SoftUni | Direct | La…

entries.title: Plovdiv IT / AI courses landscape
entries.excerpt:
# Plovdiv IT / AI courses landscape

**Date:** 2026-05-28  
**Analyst:** Developer agent (batched inbox)  
**Confidence:** medium  
**Scope:** IT, programming, and AI-related education reachable from Plovdiv (on-site, hybrid, or national online with local presence).

## Summary

Plovdiv has university and high-school AI/informatics tracks, a local IT STEP campus for multi-year software development (including Python AI modules), and access to national brands (SoftUni, NobleProg, Telerik) that sell into the city online or via Sofia/Plovdiv classrooms. There is no obvious independent “Cursor-first academy” headquartered in Plovdiv; the competitive set is a mix of degree programs, teen coding schools, and national bootcamp brands.

## Offer & positioning

| Provider | Locality | Offer & positioning | Audience | Notes |
|----------|----------|---------------------|----------|-------|
| Plovdiv University — AI (bachelor) | Plovdiv on-site | Degree in AI, ML, intelligent systems | Students 18+ | Academic path, not practitioner bootcamp |
| Plovdiv University — Informatics / ICE | Plovdiv on-site | CS / ICE engineering degrees | Students 18+ | Adjacent pipeline, long cycle |
| PU AIU short…
